human_explanation: A person in a gray shirt is riding a bicycle in a pedestrian area where cycling is not allowed.

segments.ai_explanation: All frames show pedestrians walking calmly on the walkway, which is considered normal activity for this scene.

scores.justification: The AI explanation fails to identify the anomaly of a person riding a bicycle in a pedestrian area. It provides a vague, incorrect description focusing on pedestrian activity. While the writing is clear, it completely misses the key aspects of the situation.
